inputs.label: Weight
inputs.businessContext: User's body weight in kilograms for accurate metabolic and mechanical work calculations

businessContext_i18n.en: User's body weight in kilograms for accurate metabolic and mechanical work calculations
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğru metabolik ve mekanik iş hesaplamaları için kullanıcının kilogram cinsinden vücut ağırlığı
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht des Benutzers in Kilogramm für genaue metabolische und mechanische Arbeitsberechnungen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel de l'utilisateur en kilogrammes pour des calculs métaboliques et mécaniques précis
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso corporal del usuario en kilogramos para cálculos precisos de trabajo metabólico y mecánico
businessContext_i18n.ar: وزن جسم المستخدم بالكيلوجرام لحسابات التمثيل الغذائي والعمل الميكانيكي الدقيقة

businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale de l'exercice en minutes
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración total del ejercicio en minutos

inputs.label: MET Value
inputs.businessContext: Metabolic Equivalent of Task representing intensity; 5.5 typical for moderate stair stepping

businessContext_i18n.en: Metabolic Equivalent of Task representing intensity; 5.5 typical for moderate stair stepping
businessContext_i18n.tr: Görevin metabolik eşdeğeri (MET); orta düzey merdiven çıkma için tipik 5.5
businessContext_i18n.de: Metabolisches Äquivalent der Aufgabe (MET) für die Intensität; 5,5 typisch für moderates Treppensteigen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Équivalent métabolique de la tâche représentant l'intensité ; 5,5 typique pour un stepping modéré
businessContext_i18n.es: Equivalente metabólico de la tarea que representa la intensidad; 5.5 es típico para subir escaleras moderadamente
businessContext_i18n.ar: المكافئ الأيضي للمهمة الذي يمثل الشدة؛ 5.5 نموذجي لصعود الدرج المعتدل

inputs.label: Step Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of each step in meters (typical stair riser height)

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of each step in meters (typical stair riser height)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir basamağın metre cinsinden yüksekliği (tipik merdiven rıht yüksekliği)
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe jeder Stufe in Metern (typische Setzstufenhöhe)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur de chaque marche en mètres (hauteur de contremarche typique)
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de cada escalón en metros (altura típica de contrahuella de escalera)
businessContext_i18n.ar: ارتفاع كل درجة بالأمتار (ارتفاع القائمة النموذجي)

businessContext_i18n.tr: Egzersiz sırasında ortalama adım atma hızı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Cadence moyenne de stepping pendant l'exercice
businessContext_i18n.es: Ritmo promedio de pasos durante el ejercicio

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
